task: Route Harness repository size and file-count questions to a fast native OpenClaw tool

governance_bootstrap.summary: Applied completion evidence, production verification, and CEO authority boundaries.
Applied origin-main selective deployment, Mac mini runtime verification, and secret-safe diagnostics.

root_cause.user_request: mac mini의 harness-project 폴더 내 파일들의 전체 용량은?
root_cause.failure: OpenClaw ignored the known Harness root and issued two home-directory Bash find scans. Both calls waited for approval and were declined after about 120 seconds; the Discord session ended failed without a user-facing answer.
root_cause.evidence: Production Discord session 484228e4-582c-4364-b7e3-5ddd5634dd24 contains the two Bash tool calls, declined results, failed session status, and no final assistant response.

implementation: Added native harness_workspace_stats for allocated disk bytes, logical regular-file bytes, file count, directory count, symlink count, unreadable count, and elapsed time.
Bound all target paths to the real Harness repository root without following symlink targets.
Added semantic routing for general Harness repository size, capacity, disk-usage, and file-count requests, including harness-project as an alias for harness-platform.
Explicitly prohibited Bash, find, du, and home-directory scans for this intent.

verification.name: local plugin regression
verification.result: passed, including exact Korean incident prompt routing and native stats execution

verification.name: local full repository benchmark
verification.result: allocated 5.86 GiB, logical files 5.74 GiB, 49,819 files, 4,787 directories, 42 symlinks, 0 unreadable entries, 385 ms

verification.name: production Discord failure diagnosis
verification.result: Real user entrypoint confirmed a 130.184-second failed run caused by Bash approval waits, not disk traversal time.

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh with only the plugin, skill, test, and completion evidence paths
deploy.result: pending origin-main push, force-install, gateway restart, and exact Discord-equivalent production proof
